sources: Ars Technica, BBC, GitHub, Hacker News, Other, TechCrunch, arXiv
description: AI Agent 领域最新情报

research.title: OpenAI reveals internal safety testing procedure for GPT-5
research.summary: OpenAI has disclosed its internal safety evaluation framework for the upcoming GPT-5 model, including red-teaming protocols, alignment testing, and risk mitigation strategies. The company conducted extensive evaluations across multiple risk categories, performing over 100 simulated attack scenarios to identify potential vulnerabilities before public release.

research.title: Google DeepMind publishes new paper on agent planning capabilities
research.summary: Google DeepMind researchers have published a comprehensive study on large language model planning abilities, demonstrating significant improvements in long-horizon task decomposition and multi-step reasoning. The paper introduces a novel hierarchical planning architecture that achieves state-of-the-art results on complex agent benchmarks, potentially enabling more reliable autonomous systems.

research.title: Anthropic shares findings on constitutional AI interpretability
research.summary: Anthropic's safety research team has released findings on how Claude's constitutional AI principles are internally represented and enforced. Using interpretability techniques, they identified specific neuron circuits responsible for safety boundary adherence and developed methods to audit the model's ethical reasoning process in real-time during generation.

github.title: licenseplated/ccsc
github.summary: 这是一个在 GitHub 上 Stars 数达到 0 的开源项目（licenseplated/ccsc），专注于 github, opensource。项目提供完整的框架和工具链，帮助开发者构建智能代理应用。代码开源，社区活跃。

github.title: openai/agent-safety
github.summary: OpenAI 开源的 agent-safety 工具包提供了安全性评估框架，用于检测和缓解 AI Agent 系统的潜在风险。该工具包含内容过滤、行为监控、对抗性测试等多个模块，帮助开发者在部署前验证系统的安全性和可靠性。目前已在 GitHub 获得超过 1800 stars。

github.title: microsoft/autogen
github.summary: Microsoft AutoGen 是一个多智能体对话框架，支持多个 LLM 代理相互协作来解决复杂任务。该框架提供可定制的代理、对话模式、工具集成和人类参与机制，已被广泛应用于构建复杂的 AI 工作流系统，在 GitHub 上获得超过 34,000 stars。

models.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
models.summary: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.
models.title_zh: Meta收购机器人初创公司，以加强其人形AI野心
models.summary_zh: 该公司表示， Meta收购了人形初创公司Assured Robot Intelligence ，以加强其针对机器人的人工智能模型。

models.title: Did you know you can’t steal a charity? Don’t worry. Elon Musk will remind you.
models.summary: Elon Musk spent the better part of three days on the witness stand this week in his lawsuit against OpenAI, and it’s already getting messy. Emails, texts, and his own tweets are surfacing in court, and there are plenty more witnesses to come. M
models.title_zh: 您知道您不能偷窃慈善机构吗？别担心，伊隆·马斯克会提醒你。
models.summary_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）本周在针对OpenAI的诉讼中花了三天的大部分时间在证人席上，现在已经变得混乱不堪。电子邮件、短信和他自己的推文正在法庭上浮出水面，还有很多目击者要来。

models.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
models.summary: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.
models.title_zh: 五角大楼与英伟达、微软和AWS达成协议，在机密网络上部署人工智能
models.summary_zh: 在与Anthropic就其人工智能模型的使用条款发生争议后，国防部加倍增加了对人工智能供应商的投资。
models.title_en: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
models.summary_en: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.
